metadata.description: Tags to apply to all resources
Name of the Key Vault (must be globally unique, 3-24 chars)
Location for the SFTP Logic App (may differ from resource group location)
Name of the Log Analytics workspace
Name of the storage account (must be globally unique, lowercase, no dashes)
Tenant ID for the Key Vault
Name of the Service Bus namespace
Name of the Cosmos DB account
Name of the Document Intelligence resource
Principal IDs to grant Cognitive Services User role
Principal ID of the managed identity
Name of the App Service Plan
SKU name (B1 for dev, P1v3 for prod)
Log Analytics Workspace ID for diagnostics
Cosmos DB endpoint for data access
Entra ID App Registration client ID for Easy Auth
Entra ID tenant ID for Easy Auth
Logic App trigger URL (for HTTP trigger)
Principal ID of the Logic App managed identity
Principal ID of the SFTP Logic App managed identity
Name of the SFTP Logic App
SFTP Logic App principal ID (managed identity)
Azure region (must match Logic App location)
Principal ID of the SFTP Logic App managed identity
Name of the SFTP Logic App (used for access policy naming)
Principal ID of the Web App managed identity
